52061.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home : Liverpool & Kent
52061.description: George helps more homeowners make their period homes fit for modern life, taking on an outmoded 1930s semi in Liverpool for teachers Simon and Sofie and a stunning medieval farmhouse in Kent that is like a perfectly preserved time capsule.
52061.category: Reality, Home & Garden, Bouwen en verbouwen
